title: Refused Suggestions
body:
Are you disgusted that Mojang doesn't listen to our **suggestions**? _YES ME_. So this mod adds some refused additions such as :

-** Amethyst armor** and **tools**, adding a little originality
- A dark dimension (not finished to my taste) with **crying obsidians**
- A real **craft for chainmail armor**

* This Mod is translated into **English** and **French**.

To better understand the concept :
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/7w0tdNq_pKw" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
